hero.tagline: Where machines think and engineers dream.

about.heading: About Robotics Lab Club
paragraphs: Robotics Lab Club is an elite student-led robotics and engineering club. Founded by passionate engineers, we are dedicated to building the next generation of autonomous machines and innovators.

Our team competes at national level competitions, conducts hands-on workshops, and collaborates on cutting-edge research projects. We believe in learning by building — because real engineers get their hands dirty.
From line-following robots to autonomous drones, from computer vision systems to full-stack IoT platforms — if it can be engineered, we'll build it.

pillars.title: Autonomous Systems
pillars.description: We design and program robots capable of independent decision-making using sensor fusion and ML algorithms.

pillars.title: Software Engineering
pillars.description: From embedded C to Python ML pipelines — our members master the full stack of robotics software.

pillars.title: Electronics & PCB Design
pillars.description: Custom motor drivers, sensor boards, and power management systems built from scratch.

pillars.title: Competitive Robotics
pillars.description: We compete in national and international robotics competitions — and we win.

contact.location: Robotics Lab, ECE Block, Ground floor
contact.successMessage: We'll get back to you within 48 hours. Welcome to the Robotics Lab Club family!
